subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl! We have sent down unto thee a Tablet, and before it a Book, and before that Sacred Scriptures, and ere these, Scrolls which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نبیل قد ارسلنا الیک لوحا و من قبله کتابا و من قبله زبرا و من قبله صحایف التی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment
